subcodes.first_line: I beseech Thee, O Thou by Whose most sweet call the earth and heaven were enraptured, by Thy Name through which Thou didst subdue [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسئلک یا من بندائک الأحلی انجذبت الأرض و السمآء باسمک الذی به سخرت
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
